description_for_human: JARVIS (Just A Rather Very Intelligent System) - Master AI Assistant for system orchestration, workflow management, and intelligent automation. Provides comprehensive system control and coordination capabilities.
description_for_model: JARVIS is the master agent that orchestrates all systems in the Lumina homelab environment. It provides system orchestration, workflow management, intelligence feed processing, escalation coordination, and system integration capabilities. Use JARVIS for complex multi-system operations, workflow automation, and intelligent decision-making.
